name: Mercedes-Benz of Los Angeles
description_short: Authorized Mercedes-Benz dealership in downtown Los Angeles offering new, pre-owned, and certified pre-owned vehicles with an in-house Finance Center for vehicle financing.
description_long:
Mercedes-Benz of Los Angeles is a franchised luxury automobile dealership located at 1801 S Figueroa St. in downtown Los Angeles, CA 90015. Operating under the Mercedes-Benz manufacturer franchise, the dealership serves the greater Los Angeles market with a full inventory of new, certified pre-owned, and pre-owned vehicles across the brand's complete lineup of SUVs, sedans, wagons, and electric vehicles, as well as Mercedes-Benz commercial Sprinter vans.

The dealership's consumer-facing finance offerings include an in-house Finance Center where customers can apply for vehicle financing, use a car payment calculator, and value their trade-in. Advertised financing includes 0% APR for 60 months on 2025 Mercedes-Benz Sprinter Cargo and Crew vans, and lease offers such as a $419/month lease on a Certified Pre-Owned 2026 GLC 300. Financing is arranged through Mercedes-Benz Financial Services and is subject to credit approval. Service financing is also available for repair and maintenance work.

What distinguishes Mercedes-Benz of Los Angeles from generic dealers is its full-service Sprinter Van Center catering to commercial buyers, a dedicated Lease Return Center, and multilingual sales capabilities — the site explicitly serves Spanish-, Korean-, and Mandarin-speaking customers. Sales hours run 9am–9pm daily, with service available 7am–6pm, and the dealership offers shop-from-home and custom-order options through its online showroom.

Honestly, this is an auto dealership — not a consumer finance or credit services company. The financing available is exclusively tied to purchasing or leasing a Mercedes-Benz vehicle through Mercedes-Benz Financial Services. Consumers seeking general-purpose personal loans, credit repair, or debt relief will find nothing relevant here. The finance products are premium-tier and require credit approval; there is no indication of subprime or second-chance financing programs.
address: 1801 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90015

company_info.headquarters: 1801 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90015

pros: Authorized Mercedes-Benz dealer with access to Mercedes-Benz Financial Services financing
0% APR for 60 months advertised on 2025 Sprinter Cargo and Crew vans
Certified Pre-Owned lease offers available (e.g., $419/mo on 2026 GLC 300)
Service financing available for repair and maintenance costs
Multilingual staff: Spanish, Korean, and Mandarin Chinese
Online showroom with shop-from-home and custom-order options
cons: Financing is exclusively for Mercedes-Benz vehicle purchases — not general consumer credit
All financing runs through Mercedes-Benz Financial Services and requires credit approval; no stated subprime or flexible-credit programs
Luxury price tier — entry costs are far above average vehicle financing amounts
Lease offers are VIN-specific and limited quantity; advertised deals may not be available
No connection to credit repair, debt relief, or consumer financial wellness services
best_for: Consumers with good-to-excellent credit financing a new or certified pre-owned Mercedes-Benz
Small business owners seeking commercial Sprinter van financing at 0% APR
Existing Mercedes-Benz lessees returning vehicles and exploring lease-end options
Buyers wanting to trade in a vehicle toward a luxury car purchase
diagnosis: Mercedes-Benz of Los Angeles is best suited for credit-qualified consumers or businesses financing a luxury vehicle or commercial Sprinter van purchase through Mercedes-Benz Financial Services. This is an auto dealership — it has no relevance to credit repair, personal loans, or consumer financial services, and is miscategorized on this platform.
services: New Mercedes-Benz vehicle sales (GLC, GLA, GLB, GLE, GLS, G-Class, C-Class, E-Class, S-Class, EQS)
Pre-owned vehicle sales including Cars Under $30K
Vehicle financing via Mercedes-Benz Financial Services
Mercedes-Benz Sprinter commercial van sales (new and pre-owned)
EV and plug-in hybrid vehicle sales with EV education resources
